summary: Completed comprehensive testing of News Dashboard application. All core features are working correctly with sample data. The main issue discovered was that the NewsAPI is rate-limited (429 errors), causing refresh functionality to clear existing data without adding new stories.

api_rate_limiting.issue: NewsAPI returning 429 Too Many Requests consistently
api_rate_limiting.impact: No new stories fetched during refresh cycles
api_rate_limiting.note: This is expected behavior mentioned in agent context - free tier exhausted

integration_issues.issue: Refresh clears all data when NewsAPI is rate-limited
integration_issues.impact: Stories disappear after manual refresh when API fails

passed_tests: Country filtering with flag emojis and story counts
News card display with source badges, priority badges, relevance scores
Stats panel showing source distribution, priority breakdown, country coverage
Header with story count, last updated time, refresh countdown timer

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all UI features working, minor data persistence issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: Consider implementing fallback behavior for refresh functionality when NewsAPI is rate-limited - either preserve existing data or implement graceful degradation instead of clearing all stories. The current behavior results in empty dashboard after refresh attempts.
